Resupply schedule

Days end at 02:00 or when 4000 m of gain is reached — but the cap is only enforced after 00:30 (earliest valid stop), so no short bridge days occur. Sleep 4.5–6 h, all days resume at 06:30. Times marked * are off-route stops.

Speed model

The estimated times use a gradient-adjusted speed model:

\[ v(g) = \begin{cases} v_0 \cdot e^{-k_u \cdot g} & g \geq 0 \text{ (uphill)} \\ \min\!\left(v_0 \cdot e^{-k_d \cdot g},\, v_{\max}\right) & g < 0 \text{ (downhill)} \end{cases} \]

where \(g\) is gradient in %, \(v_0 =\) 13.8 km/h, \(k_u =\) 0.08, \(k_d =\) 0.04, \(v_{\max} =\) 32 km/h.

GPS elevation noise suppressed with rolling median (window = 31 points ≈ 300 m). Gradient capped at ±30% before speed calculation.
